hero.title: Sculpted in Gold. Defined by Brilliance.
hero.subtitle: Discover Trimetra's fine jewelry collection, handcrafted with conflict-free diamonds, grade-AAA pearls, and solid 18k gold.

brandStory.title: The Trimetra Story
paragraphs: Founded on the principles of design purity, mathematical precision, and exceptional hand-craftsmanship, Trimetra creates fine jewelry that transcends fleeting trends. The name Trimetra is derived from the fusion of symmetry, material integrity, and artistic vision.

Each design starts with a hand-drawn sketch and is brought to life by master artisans who have spent decades perfecting their craft. We source only the finest raw materials—ethically and sustainably—to ensure that every piece is not only beautiful but also a responsible heirloom for the future.

vision.title: Our Vision
paragraphs: Our vision is to establish Trimetra as one of India's most trusted luxury jewellery brands, where every creation reflects beauty, authenticity, and excellence. We aspire to expand across India and international markets while continuing to innovate, inspire, and create jewellery that becomes a cherished part of every customer's story.
Trimetra isn't just jewellery. It's trust, transformed into timeless elegance.

testimonials.name: Sophia Varma
testimonials.text: The Aurelia Pendant is absolutely breath-taking. The filigree work is so delicate and catches the light beautifully. The experience of buying was seamless, and the custom WhatsApp consultation was incredibly helpful.

testimonials.name: Marcus & Elena Lindqvist
testimonials.text: We ordered the Empress Bridal Set for our wedding. The craftsmanship is flawless, and it felt like wearing a piece of art. Trimetra's team went above and beyond to deliver it ahead of schedule.

testimonials.name: Devika Sen
testimonials.text: I appreciate the transparency in material sourcing. Knowing my Colombian emerald drops are conflict-free makes them even more special. The weight and balance of the earrings are perfect.

whatsapp.message: Hello, I am visiting your website and would like to make an enquiry.

location.address: 03, Ground floor, Zarine building, 4th Road, opp. Bhabha Hospital, Bandra W, Mumbai 400050
location.hours: Mon - Sat: 10:00 AM - 7:00 PM (By Appointment Only)

founderStory.title: The Story of Trimetra
paragraphs: Trimetra was born from a legacy of trust in the precious metals industry. Backed by years of experience through Sachchiyay Mata Bullion Pvt. Ltd. and Osiya Bullion & Jewellers LLP, our journey began in the bullion market, where purity, transparency, and integrity are the foundation of every transaction.

Over the years, we have built strong relationships with jewellers, investors, and customers across India by delivering certified precious metals with uncompromising quality. This trust inspired us to create Trimetra, a brand that brings the same credibility and excellence from bullion into the world of fine jewellery.

At Trimetra, we believe jewellery is more than an ornament; it is a celebration of life's milestones, emotions, and timeless memories. Every piece is thoughtfully designed by combining modern aesthetics with exceptional craftsmanship, ensuring elegance, comfort, and lasting value.

What truly sets Trimetra apart is our unwavering commitment to purity, transparent pricing, superior craftsmanship, and customer-first service. Our deep roots in the bullion industry allow us to maintain the highest standards of quality while offering jewellery that customers can wear with pride and confidence.

items.title: Trust and Transparency
items.desc: Clear communication, honest guidance, and transparent practices form the foundation of every Trimetra relationship.

items.title: Certified Purity
items.desc: Our roots in bullion help us uphold strict standards of purity, authenticity, and material confidence.

items.title: Timeless Design
items.desc: Each piece is created with refined proportions and enduring elegance so it remains meaningful across generations.

items.title: Exceptional Craftsmanship
items.desc: Thoughtful detailing, skilled finishing, and careful construction define every jewellery piece we create.

items.title: Long-term Relationships
items.desc: We build lasting customer relationships through dependable service, care, and a customer-first approach.

all.title: Fine Jewellery Collections
all.description: Discover our complete catalog of signature rings, necklaces, earrings, cuffs, and jewelry sets handcrafted with conflict-free diamonds, grade-AAA pearls, and solid 18k gold.

necklaces.title: Necklaces & Pendants
necklaces.description: Elegantly draped chains, collars, and brilliant pendants handcrafted in 18k gold and platinum.

earrings.title: Earrings & Drops
earrings.description: From delicate studs to dramatic diamond drops, designed to capture light with every movement.

rings.title: Fine Rings
rings.description: Exquisite solitaire engagement rings, eternity bands, and custom statement rings.

bracelets.title: Bracelets
bracelets.description: Timeless tennis bracelets, structured cuffs, and delicate chain bracelets designed for everyday luxury.

sets.title: Signature Jewellery Sets
sets.description: Heirloom-quality kundan, diamond, and pearl sets crafted to celebrate life's most precious milestones.
